title: grindelia stricta var. hendersonii
intro: Grindelia stricta var. hendersonii, also known as Henderson's gumweed, is a variety of the Grindelia stricta plant, a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Grindelia stricta var. hendersonii include relieving coughs and congestion, as well as providing antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to make teas, syrups, and other remedies for respiratory health.
